title: 1.8 PvP Pack
description: A 1.8.9 PvP client featuring several optimization and ultility mods.
body:
## Hey!
**Install Optifine for the best experience. Download the mod [here](https://optifine.net/adloadx?f=OptiFine_1.8.9_HD_U_M5.jar), go to this instance and select Add From File, then select the Optifine .jar.**


1.8 PvP Pack is a 1.8.9-based PvP modpack featuring several optimization and utility mods. To configure mods, press Right Shift.

Hypixel is automatically included in the server list.
